vision_report.narrative_description: The biome is in a state of arrested development. P1 and P2 have suffered total systemic loss, leaving only soil. P3 and P4 remain in a static, low-energy state. The presence of non-botanical items (eggshells, IC chip) suggests an experimental or decorative intervention that has not yet yielded biological growth. The environment appears stable but unproductive.
